series_metadata.series_description: Documentation provided in a job audit (such as employee request for job audit, employee request to cancel job audit, completed employee section, completed supervisor section, completed agency coordinator section, PD, technician's report & recommendation, payroll & data sheet, notification letters to employee and appointing authority, letter requesting copy of audit) before the audit is canceled or withdrawn.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: in office area from date audit was cancelled ; Paper: in office area from date audit was cancelled
